header.title: MapKHCorrect
header.tagline: Fix the Map, Help the Nation

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: An overview of all report activities.
dashboard.issue_type_desc: Breakdown of all submitted reports by their type.

challenges.section_description: Inaccurate maps hinder daily life, commerce, and development across Cambodia. Here are the key issues our community is solving.
challenges.incorrect_info_desc: Shops, restaurants, and vital services are often misplaced, misnamed, or missing entirely, causing confusion for customers and delivery services.
challenges.poor_road_data_desc: Countless smaller roads (‘phlovlum’), especially in rural areas, are missing. Road names and conditions are frequently wrong, impacting logistics and travel.
challenges.inaccurate_addresses_desc: Formal addresses are rarely used. Our platform captures the local, informal place names that people actually use for navigation.
challenges.outdated_imagery_desc: Satellite and Street View images can be years old, failing to reflect Cambodia's rapid development and new constructions.
challenges.language_barriers_desc: Most maps lack Khmer script. We prioritize dual-language input (Khmer & English) to make the map truly accessible for everyone.
challenges.unverified_info_desc: Changes on other platforms can be slow and lack transparency. Our community-based verification ensures data is reliable and up-to-date.

categories.place_types_desc: Manage the place types (e.g., Restaurant, School) that reports can be associated with.

teams.title: Break into Groups – Choose Your Province
teams.step1_desc: Let's start by organizing your teams! How many groups would you like to create for this activity?
teams.group_details_desc: Now, let's name your group and add its members. Please enter a unique name for this group and list the names of its members, separated by commas.
teams.error_num_groups: Please enter a valid number of groups.
teams.error_group_name: Please provide a name for all groups.
teams.error_one_member: Please select at least one member for each group.
teams.step2_desc: Great! Now that your teams are set, it's time for each group to select a province or area in Cambodia to focus on.
teams.error_select_province: Please select at least one province for all groups.
teams.error_unique_province: Each province must be unique. Please re-select provinces.
teams.step3_desc: Excellent! Each group now has a province. The final step is to define a mini-goal for each team related to their chosen province. This goal should be specific and achievable.
teams.mini_goal_placeholder: e.g., Research 3 key cultural sites in Siem Reap
teams.mini_goal_desc: Think about what your group wants to achieve in relation to this province. For example: 'Research 3 key cultural sites in Siem Reap,' or 'Identify 5 local businesses in Kampot that need support.'
teams.error_mini_goal: Please set a mini-goal for all groups.
teams.step4_desc: Here's a summary of your team setup:
teams.no_teams_created: No teams have been created yet.
teams.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this team? This action cannot be undone.

user_guide.title: How to Submit a Report to MapKH
user_guide.description: Complete guide to reporting map issues and contributing to better maps for Cambodia

welcome.title: Welcome to MapKH
welcome.description: MapKH is a community-driven platform for improving map data in Cambodia. Your reports help make maps more accurate and useful for everyone.

location.title: Select Location
location.description: Click on the map to select the exact location where you found the issue
location.detail1: Use the map to navigate to the problem area
location.detail2: Click precisely on the location with the issue
location.detail3: The system will automatically detect the province and coordinates
location.detail4: You can zoom in for more precise location selection

category.title: Choose Issue Category
category.description: Select the type of map issue you want to report
category.detail1: First select a violation group (e.g., Place Information, Road Data)
category.detail2: Then choose specific issue types that apply
category.detail3: You can select multiple issue types if relevant
category.detail4: Use "General" for issues not covered by other categories

description.title: Describe the Issue
description.description: Provide a clear and detailed description of the problem
description.detail1: Write at least 10 characters describing the issue
description.detail2: Be specific about what is wrong or missing
description.detail3: Include what the correct information should be
description.detail4: Use clear language that others can understand

languages.title: Add Language Information
languages.description: Provide names in English, Khmer, and Thai languages
languages.detail1: Enter the correct name in English if available
languages.detail2: Add the native Khmer name for local accuracy
languages.detail3: Include Thai name if the location has one
languages.detail4: Use translation buttons to help with language conversion

details.title: Additional Details
details.description: Set priority, add notes, and provide additional context
details.detail1: Set priority level: Low, Medium, or High
details.detail2: Add any additional notes or context
details.detail3: Include links to supporting documentation if available

submit.title: Submit Report
submit.description: Review and submit your report for processing
submit.detail1: Review all entered information for accuracy
submit.detail2: The system will check for duplicate reports
submit.detail3: Confirm submission if no duplicates are found
submit.detail4: Track your report status in the Records section

accuracy.title: Be Accurate
accuracy.description: Precise location and detailed descriptions help resolve issues faster

evidence.title: Provide Evidence
evidence.description: Include links to photos or documentation when possible

community.title: Community First
community.description: Check if someone else has already reported the same issue

patience.title: Be Patient
patience.description: Reports are reviewed by volunteers and may take time to process

good.title: Good Example
good.example: "The restaurant name is shown as 'Old Name' but it has been renamed to 'New Restaurant Name' since 2023. The correct Khmer name is 'ឈ្មោះថ្មី' and it serves traditional Cambodian cuisine."

q1.question: How long does it take to process a report?
q1.answer: Reports are typically reviewed within 1-7 days, depending on complexity and volunteer availability.

q2.question: Can I edit my report after submission?
q2.answer: Yes, you can edit your reports from the Records page before they are approved.

q3.question: What happens if my report is rejected?
q3.answer: Rejected reports include feedback explaining why. You can revise and resubmit with corrections.

q4.question: How do I know if my report was successful?
q4.answer: Check the Records page to see your report status and any updates from reviewers.

q5.question: Can I report issues in multiple languages?
q5.answer: Yes! Providing names in English, Khmer, and Thai helps make maps more accessible to everyone.

support.title: Need More Help?
support.description: If you have questions not covered here, you can:
support.option1: Check the community discussions in the Teams section
support.option2: Look at examples from other approved reports
support.option3: Start with simple reports to learn the process
